steps.title: Move the variable terms
steps.content:
Add $9x$ to both sides of the equation.
$$9x-23=23-9x$$
$$18x-23=23$$
Then add $23$ to both sides.
$$18x=46$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content:
The equation has a nonzero coefficient on $x$, so it has one value of $x$ that works.
$$x=\frac{46}{18}=\frac{23}{9}$$
Therefore, the equation has exactly one solution. The answer is B.
